pageContext.name: The Lion King
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Art Brand Studios are excited to present The Lion King Stained Glass Framed Art!  Let the light shine! Framed glass art hangings show their true colors when backlit with natural sunlight. Classic images by Thomas Kinkade Studios are printed with fade-resistant inks directly on glass, framed, and ready to hang. Each piece of framed glass art is hand-crafted and assembled in the USA.   Framed glass art hangings show their true colors when backlit with natural sunlight. Don't miss your chance to order yours today!
